notes: Level 1 targeted 30-50 queries across all 12 dimensions. Collected 129 unique sources from 15 parallel search batches. Sources include comparison articles, platform docs, practitioner blogs, HN threads, research reports, and industry analysis.
Beginning Level 2 expansion: extracting references, outbound links, and named entities from all 129 Level 1 sources

Deep-dive on Upwork-related news: Claude Connector announcement and board refreshment. Additional reference extraction from comparison articles and platform docs produced overlapping sources already captured in Level 1.

Level 2 expansion produced 2 new unique sources. Most outbound links from Level 1 sources pointed to already-registered platform documentation, official sites, and overlapping comparison articles. The deep research mode caught the latest Upweek Claude Connector and board news.
Level 3 skipped due to source threshold sufficiency. Total 131 sources meets practical synthesis requirements. Continuing to TRIANGULATE phase.
